productDisplayName: Vans Unisex Authentic Lo Pro Brown Casual Shoes
description: vans Authentic Lo Pro coaxes you from the staple regular casual shoes into this exciting pair. The animal inspired print on the upper suits the high-fashion obsession with animal print clothing, while giving your off-duty ensembles a fresh new vibe. Wear these sockless with any casual outfit. Comes with a spare pair of different coloured laces. Upper Canvas uppers with leopard print Vanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sandal sock liner Central lacing system Logo flag on midfoot Padded tongue and collar for instep comfort Cut low at the ankle for style Midsole PU midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Waffle sole texture on the flexible vulcanized gum rubber outsole shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
